channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PODDAR] Poddar Housing Not a Large Entity for 2026 Debt Disclosure
item.description:
Poddar Housing and Development Ltd has confirmed it does not meet the criteria to be classified as a 'Large Entity' as per the SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/P/CIR/613 dated August 10, 2021. This classification is relevant for fundraising via debt securities. The company reported nil outstanding borrowings as of March 31, 2026, as it has not issued any listed Non-Convertible Securities, Securitised Debt Instruments, Security Receipts, Municipal Debt Securities, or Commercial Papers. Consequently, the disclosure requirements for large entities under the SEBI framework do not apply.

  • Poddar Housing confirms non-applicability of 'Large Entity' status.
  • No outstanding borrowings as of March 31, 2026.
  • Company has not issued listed debt instruments.
  • SEBI disclosure requirements for large entities do not apply.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Poddar Housing and Development Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [RISHDIGA] Rishabh Digha Steel Re-appoints Independent Director Jigar Sheth
item.description:
Rishabh Digha Steel & Allied Products Ltd announced the re-appointment of Mr. Jigar Rajendra Sheth as an Independent Director for a second term of 5 years, effective April 22, 2026, to April 21, 2031. This decision was approved by the Board of Directors following a recommendation from the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. The re-appointment is subject to shareholder approval via a postal ballot process. The company has also appointed a scrutinizer for the postal ballot and outlined the calendar of events for the voting process.

  • Independent Director Jigar Rajendra Sheth re-appointed for a second 5-year term.
  • Re-appointment effective April 22, 2026, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Board approved re-appointment based on Nomination Committee recommendation.
  • Shareholder approval to be sought via postal ballot and e-voting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RISHABH DIGHA STEEL & ALLIED PRODUCTS LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PHCAP] PH Capital Ltd Board Meeting on April 23, 2026 for Audited Results
item.description:
PH Capital Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for April 23, 2026. The primary agenda is to consider and approve the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the board will take note of the audit report from S.P. Jain and Associates. The company also reaffirmed that the trading window remains closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the results declaration, in line with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 23, 2026.
  • To approve audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Audit report from S.P. Jain and Associates to be noted.
  • Trading window remains closed until results announcement.
  • Compliance with SEBI (Insider Trading) Regulations confirmed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PH CAPITAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NELCO] Nelco Subsidiary Appoints Protiviti as Internal Auditor
item.description:
Nelco Ltd's wholly-owned subsidiary, Nelco Network Products Limited (NNPL), has appointed Protiviti India Member Private Limited as its internal auditor. The appointment is for a term of three consecutive years, commencing from the Financial Year 2026-27. Protiviti is a global consulting firm with expertise in finance, technology, operations, and risk management, including internal audit services.

  • Nelco's subsidiary NNPL appoints Protiviti India as Internal Auditor.
  • Appointment is for a term of three years.
  • Commencement date for the audit term is FY 2026-27.
  • Protiviti is a global consulting firm with broad expertise.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NELCO LTD. | Category: Auditor

item.title: [MISHKA] Mishka Exim Board Meeting on April 28 to Approve Q4/FY26 Results
item.description:
Mishka Exim Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 28, 2026, to approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will also include the review of the statutory auditors' report. Concurrently, the company has closed its trading window for designated persons from April 1, 2026, and it will reopen 48 hours after the financial results are made public, in compliance with SEBI regulations.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 28, 2026.
  • To approve audited Q4 and FY26 financial results.
  • Includes review of statutory auditors' report.
  • Trading window closed until results announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mishka Exim Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ASIAPAK] Asia Pack Ltd Responds to BSE on Share Price Movement
item.description:
Asia Pack Limited has responded to a clarification sought by the BSE regarding a significant movement in its share price on April 15, 2026. The company stated that it promptly informs the stock exchange of all price-sensitive information and has not withheld any material events. Asia Pack Limited attributes the recent share price movement to market-driven factors and prevailing market conditions, asserting that there is no undisclosed price-sensitive information or impending corporate action that needs to be announced. The company has requested the BSE to take this clarification on record.

  • Asia Pack Ltd clarifies share price movement to BSE.
  • Company confirms no undisclosed price-sensitive information.
  • Attributes price fluctuation to market-driven factors.
  • No impending corporate actions or announcements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ASIA PACK LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [GOEL] Goel Food Products Clarifies Share Price Movement to BSE
item.description:
Goel Food Products Ltd has responded to a clarification request from BSE Limited regarding recent price movements in its securities. The company stated that it regularly discloses all material information impacting its operations and performance as per SEBI regulations. Goel Food Products attributes the current share price fluctuation to market conditions and states it has no control or specific knowledge of the reasons behind it. The company reaffirms its commitment to timely disclosure of all relevant information.

  • Company responded to BSE clarification on share price movement.
  • Attributes price movement to market conditions.
  • Reiterates adherence to SEBI disclosure norms.
  • No specific knowledge of reasons for price fluctuation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Goel Food Products Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [SUBEX] Subex Ltd Board Meeting on May 12 to Approve Q4 FY26 Results
item.description:
Subex Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on May 12, 2026, to approve the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. The company has also scheduled an earnings conference call for May 13, 2026, at 11:00 AM IST, to discuss the financial performance. The trading window for Subex shares will be closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the results announcement.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026, to approve Q4 FY26 results.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 to be considered.
  • Earnings call to discuss results on May 13, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until post-results.
  • Subex is a telecom analytics solution provider.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUBEX LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DIGIFIBRE] Digital Fibre Infrastructure Trust: Investor Grievance Report Q4 FY26
item.description:
Digital Fibre Infrastructure Trust has submitted its investor grievance report for the fourth quarter of the financial year 2025-26, ending March 31, 2026. The report, prepared in accordance with SEBI regulations, indicates zero pending or received complaints during the quarter and the financial year. This suggests a smooth investor relations process for the Trust during the period.

  • Investor grievance report for Q4 FY26 submitted.
  • Zero complaints received during the quarter.
  • Zero complaints pending at the end of the quarter.
  • Zero complaints received or pending for the full FY26.
  • Indicates effective investor grievance redressal.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Digital Fibre Infrastructure Trust | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [THOMASCOOK] Thomas Cook India Launches Visa Rejection Cover
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Thomas Cook (India) Ltd and its group company SOTC Travel have launched a unique 'Visa Rejection Cover', a first in the Indian travel and travel insurance industry. Underwritten by ICICI Lombard, this insurance solution safeguards travellers against financial losses arising from visa rejections for non-immigrant or employment visas. The cover will indemnify the insured for non-recoverable advance payments towards accommodation and travel, including applicable official cancellation charges. This innovative product aims to provide greater reassurance and financial security to travellers, reinforcing the companies' commitment to customer-centric solutions.

  • Thomas Cook India & SOTC Travel launch pioneering Visa Rejection Cover.
  • Product safeguards travellers against financial losses from visa rejection.
  • Underwritten by ICICI Lombard, it covers non-recoverable travel expenses.
  • Aims to enhance customer confidence and financial security in travel planning.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THOMAS COOK (INDIA) LTD. | Category: New Launch
